I'm a huge fan of Pacific Rim, and from what I can tell so is the creator of this game.

I've played this game from the very start when it was only bare-bones and I've seen it improve so much over time, however...

I feel like the game is going in the wrong direction. The creator seems to be going more for quantity rather than quality. You'll find yourself in the main scenario mode fighting sometimes 10 kaiju at a time and possibly 50 or double that over the course of just one battle. And they are so easy to eliminate, sometimes just pull off their head and that's it you've won. You also don't do much damage with your fists, it focuses more on weapons that you pick up and hold, rather than making your Mecha more personal you just end up using the same items as everyone else. And sure some might find that great but to me it loses all sense of epicness. 

I think if they steer more towards 1v1 drawn out battles where it's just you standing between the Kaiju and the city then you'll get so much more out of this game, especially with the more unique Kaiju's they keep adding. Make the battle lasting and meaningful, so that when you do finally defeat it, you'll feel like you actually accomplished something.

I'm really looking forward to what comes next for this game as it's potential is very, very promising.

TLDR the game is fun but needs more time in the oven and the creative direction needs to be adjusted slightly

add multiplayer mode please, it will be much better fighting endless waves of kaijus with other people, or multiplayer scenario, also add things for mobility, like jetpacks, thrusters to dash the direction with your joystick, jetpack so you can jump higher and in air double tap jump button to hover for short amount of time, also in multiplayer, make the system similar to solo scenarios, where you get choice with cards, and feature that you can heal yourself that will cost points, or regenerate a limb that you lost, also, more monsters :3
It is fun I had a great time killing kaijus but can it be multiplayer? Thank you

reviews.review_title: PEAK WHILE ALSO IN EARLY RELEASE
reviews.review_description: So I had bought this game before update 0.5, and the game was good then. However, the new update 0.5 came out and all I have to say is that the game is peak vr. For people into pacific rim, mechs, and kaiju, this game is peak. Gameplay is fun and you can do a lot, there’s a lot of weapons, and the new map is beautiful. All of this while still being early release is crazy. The game can evolve into many things and I can’t wait for the full game! The devs should really listen to the community and if they do this can be my favorite vr game

reviews.review_title: Good game, but could be a lot better.
reviews.review_description:
This Game Is AWESOME don't get me wrong. I love Pacific rim and to basically be in a Jaeger is a dream come true.
But there are some problems.
This game EATS Memory leading to eventual game crashes. 

Also in the home menu the interface should be static. Like when I'm trying to make my robot look good I can barely see it because the whole thing moves.

And pls add multiplayer.

All in all if you like fighting big monsters with big robots, then this game is good for you.

developer_response.body: Thanks for the review! The memory issue should be resolved in the next update. We will also look into improving the menu usability
